scripts.install-emulator: pebble build && pebble install --emulator gabbro && pebble logs
scripts.screenshots: pebble build && pebble install --emulator aplite && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_aplite.png --emulator aplite --no-open && pebble install --emulator basalt && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_basalt.png --emulator basalt --no-open && pebble install --emulator chalk && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_chalk.png --emulator chalk --no-open && pebble install --emulator diorite && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_diorite.png --emulator diorite --no-open && pebble install --emulator emery && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_emery.png --emulator emery --no-open && pebble install --emulator gabbro && pebble screenshot store/screenshots/screenshot_gabbro.png --emulator gabbro
